subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of God! May ye ever be, through divine bounty, the recipients of heavenly grace. That which was set forth in the petition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان حق انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایت الهی فائز باشید آنچه در عریضه معروض
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement
